blended.narrative: Poley Mountain is expecting dry conditions over the next 48 hours. The 14-day outlook shows 12 inches total.

daily_summary.narrative: Sunday: light rain showers, highs of 48°F.
Wednesday: 2.2" of snow, highs of 42°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.

Tuesday: 2.4" of snow, highs of 34°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
